title: Courseforge Block Routing Policy
description: Operator-tunable routing policy for the Courseforge two-pass router (Phase 3). Maps block_type + tier (outline | rewrite) to a provider/model spec, with optional per-block_id overrides. Loaded by Courseforge/router/policy.py::load_block_routing_policy and consumed by CourseforgeRouter._resolve_spec as the second-priority resolver after per-call kwargs but before tier-default env vars and the hardcoded fallback table.

version.description: Schema version. Pinned to 1 for the Phase 3 surface; bumped if the shape ever breaks backward compatibility.

capability_tiers.description: Optional operator-supplied capability-tier table. Keys are operator-chosen labels (small / medium / large recommended; any non-empty string is allowed). Values are full BlockProviderSpec dicts referenced from per-tier `capability_tier` fields elsewhere in the policy. The runtime resolves a `capability_tier: <name>` reference by string lookup against this table. Optional — when absent or empty, every Spec must carry explicit provider/model fields per the legacy contract.

defaults.description: Tier-level default specs applied when no per-block_type entry matches. Each tier (outline | rewrite) carries an optional Spec.

blocks.description: Per-block_type override surface. Keys are the canonical 16-value Courseforge.scripts.blocks.BLOCK_TYPES enum.

n_candidates.description: Override for self-consistency candidate count for this block_type's outline tier.

regen_budget.description: Override for the regeneration-attempt budget on this block_type's outline tier.

regen_budget_rewrite.description: Phase 3.5 Subtask 21: per-block-type override for the rewrite-tier regen budget consumed by Courseforge.router.router.CourseforgeRouter.route_rewrite_with_remediation. Symmetric to ``regen_budget`` (which applies to the outline tier).

escalate_immediately.description: When true, skip outline dispatch entirely for this block_type and short-circuit to the rewrite tier with escalation_marker='outline_skipped_by_policy'.

overrides.description: Per-block_id overrides. Walked first by BlockRoutingPolicy.resolve before per-block_type / defaults entries. block_id supports fnmatch globs (matched via match_block_id_glob).

block_id.description: Stable Block ID or fnmatch glob (e.g. 'week_03_module_01#assessment_item_quiz_*').

escalate_immediately.description: Per-block_id escalate-immediately flag; same semantics as the per-block_type field.

Spec.description: Provider/model spec for a single (block_type, tier) cell. Fields mirror Courseforge.router.router.BlockProviderSpec; the loader projects this dict into a frozen BlockProviderSpec at policy load time.

model.description: Provider-specific model identifier (e.g. 'qwen2.5:7b-instruct-q4_K_M' for Ollama / 'claude-sonnet-4-6' for Anthropic / 'meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-Turbo' for Together).

base_url.description: Optional base URL override for OpenAI-compatible backends (e.g. 'http://localhost:11434/v1' for Ollama, 'http://localhost:8000/v1' for vLLM).

api_key_env.description: Optional env-var name the provider should read its API key from instead of the per-provider default (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / TOGETHER_API_KEY / LOCAL_SYNTHESIS_API_KEY).

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Outline tier conventionally 0.0 (deterministic structural sampling); rewrite tier conventionally 0.4 (controlled prose variability).

max_tokens.description: Max output tokens. Outline tier conventionally ~1200; rewrite tier conventionally ~2400.

capability_tier.description: Optional symbolic capability-tier reference resolved against the top-level `capability_tiers` table. When set as a single string, the resolved tier spec wins over any sibling provider/model fields in this Spec (sibling-explicit fields still overlay the tier resolution). When set as an ordered list, the runtime walks the list as a cascading-regeneration chain — try the first tier; on per-tier sub-budget exhaustion, escalate to the next. The list form is the operator-tunable hook that keeps every provider/model decision out of the codebase. Optional; legacy YAML without this field continues to validate and run unchanged.

regen_budget.description: Optional per-tier-spec regen budget. Consumed by `CourseforgeRouter._tier_sub_budget` when this Spec is used as a capability_tiers entry. When unset the runtime falls back to `resolved_budget // len(tier_chain)` (floor 1).
